productDisplayName: Highlander Men White Red Checked Shirt
description: CompositionFull sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has red and white plaid checks with black accents, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered logo, full length buttoned placket with red buttons with a scraped look, appliqued brand tab on the facing placket towards the bottom and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this   red and white plaid check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
